tags.small_sample: Too few observations for the stated claim.
tags.few_independent_clusters: Nominal observations collapse to too few independent episode or time clusters.
tags.high_variance: Outcome or measurement dispersion materially weakens precision.
tags.wide_cluster_uncertainty: Cluster-aware uncertainty interval is wide relative to the claim.
tags.threshold_sensitive: Conclusion is not robust near the frozen measurement or decision threshold.
tags.cost_sensitive: Plausible cost changes materially alter economic relevance.
tags.symbol_concentrated: Evidence depends materially on a narrow symbol set.
tags.time_concentrated: Evidence depends materially on a narrow time or regime segment.
tags.context_dependent: Evidence is conditional on a causal observable context not yet independently established.
tags.measurement_underidentified: Observed state does not identify the claimed mechanism or actor sufficiently.
tags.proxy_side_or_reference: Direction, side, or reference leg is proxied rather than directly and completely observed.
tags.mechanically_sparse: The strict mechanism produces too few mechanically eligible events.
tags.lifecycle_capped: Universe or eligibility is capped by incomplete point-in-time lifecycle authority.
tags.funding_incomplete: Exact funding coverage is incomplete for the claim interval.
tags.not_control_eligible: The binding policy does not admit this object to controls; this tag restates the gate and grants no authority.
